Class: AutocompleteGeocodingResponse

bemap.AutocompleteGeocodingResponse(optionsopt)

new AutocompleteGeocodingResponse(optionsopt)

BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - AutocompleteGeocodingResponse Container for the list of `AutocompleteElement` items returned by the `bemap.Autocomplete` / `bemap.GeoAutocomplete` services.
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Description
items Array.<bemap.AutocompleteElement> <optional>
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/search/bemap-autocomplete-geocoding-response.js, line 13
